title: Permanent Light Generator
description: Solar generators packed up are not enough.
body:
# Permanent Light Generator

*Generator goodies*

Unofficial remake of [VisibleRay Generator](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/visibleraygenerator) for Minecraft 1.16.5 and beyond.

The mod features a series of unique generators that can generate Forge Energy/TR Energy eternally without any fuel/environment requirements.
